Off Calendar May-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ryan J. Vlasak, Esq., of Bradshaw & Associates PC, 433-4800, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Adam N. Gurley, Esq., 386-3529, for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ADAM GURLEY'S Petition To Compel Arbitration and Motion To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed was taken under submission. Defendant submitted a proposed order. Plaintiff is to submit a proposed order to the court. (301/JLW/CK) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
